keyEvents.text: Goal! Guatemala 1, Dominican Republic 0. Óscar Santis (Guatemala) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by José Morales with a cross.
José Rosales (Guatemala) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Guatemala 1, Dominican Republic 1. Dorny Romero (Dominican Republic) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner following a set piece situation.
Substitution, Guatemala. Óscar Castellanos replaces José Rosales because of an injury.
Goal! Guatemala 1, Dominican Republic 2. Heinz Mörschel (Dominican Republic) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom right corner.
First Half ends, Guatemala 1, Dominican Republic 2.
Substitution, Guatemala. Arquímides Ordóñez replaces Rubio Rubín.
Substitution, Guatemala. Olger Escobar replaces Pedro Altán.
Edgar Pujol (Dominican Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal! Guatemala 2, Dominican Republic 2. Nicolás Samayoa (Guatemala) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Óscar Santis with a cross following a set piece situation.
Jean López (Dominican Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Guatemala 3, Dominican Republic 2. Óscar Santis (Guatemala) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by José Morales with a cross.
Óscar Santis (Guatemala) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
Goal! Guatemala 4, Dominican Republic 2. Óscar Santis (Guatemala) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Rudy Muñoz.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Juan Pineda replaces Juan Familia-Castillo.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Edarlyn Reyes replaces Peter Federico.
Substitution, Guatemala. Nathaniel Méndez-Laing replaces Óscar Santis.
Substitution, Guatemala. Elmer Cardoza replaces Rudy Muñoz.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Rafa Núñez replaces Edgar Pujol.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Erick Paniagua replaces Ronaldo Vásquez.
Second Half ends, Guatemala 4, Dominican Republic 2.
